name: Recipefork Cooking Tips Editor
description: Reusable cooking tips editor for both Simple Mode and Chef Mode recipes, supporting optional bullet-style tips with ordering and removal controls.

bullet-editor.description: Optional bullet-note editor with add, reorder, and remove controls.

slots.empty-state: Prompt that explains there are no tips yet

visual_brief: This should feel lighter than the main recipe instructions: quick, practical, and easy to scan, like the author's final notes to another cook.
